commit.message:
Castellarius: comprehensive state machine simplification (#422)

## Summary

Accumulated hardening fixes had turned the Castellarius into a
non-deterministic mess that could burn LLM tokens in respawn loops and
other edge cases. This PR strips all of that back to the clean
invariants.

## Invariants restored

1. Only agents write outcomes - Castellarius never calls SetOutcome
2. Castellarius never kills sessions - if tmux is alive, let it run
3. Every spawn is always fresh - no --continue/resume logic
4. Sessions exit automatically - exec prefix + remain-on-exit off make
zombie state structurally impossible

## Changes

### Deleted entirely
- dispatch_loop.go + tests - race-prone heuristic recovery loop
- stuck_delivery.go + tests - invasive session killing mechanism

### scheduler.go
- Removed phantom commit check (false positives)
- Removed auto-promote (masked misbehaviour)
- Removed dirty worktree redundant checks
- Removed dirtyNonContextFiles(), sandboxHead(), GetLastReviewedCommit
- Removed dispatchLoop, rebaseAndPushFn, ghMergeFn, findPRFn,
killSessionFn struct fields

### session.go (cataractae)
- Removed priorSessionCount(), buildContinueCmd(), --continue flag -
always fresh spawn
- Prepend exec to agent command: shell replaced by agent, pane closes
when agent exits
- Set remain-on-exit off after session creation to override any user
tmux.conf
- Deleted isAgentAlive() and tmuxDisplayMessage - zombie state is now
structurally impossible

### Tests
- Fixed 2 flaky timing tests using waitCalls instead of time.Sleep(50ms)
- Updated all HasPrefix assertions for exec prefix
- Deleted TestIsAgentAlive_* tests (5 tests)

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Lobsterdog <lobsterdog@openclaw.ai>

* fix: pin Docker Compose project name to prevent volume splitting

Docker Compose derives the project name from the directory name by default.
Running `docker compose` from different directories (e.g. `docker/` vs a
deployment dir) created separate named volumes, causing the OAuth config
stored in SQLite to be stranded in one volume while the app ran against a
different empty volume — prompting the setup wizard on every restart.

Changes:
- Add `name: the-matrix` to all three compose files so the project name
  is stable regardless of which directory `docker compose` runs from
- Add automatic volume migration to update.sh that detects orphaned
  volumes from previous project names and copies data + encryption keys
- Override still possible via COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME or `-p` flag

enumeration can corrupt state or throw. Replaced with ConcurrentQueue<T>
which safely supports concurrent Enqueue + enumeration.

via #292).

fix(ec718): correct USB port detection and CP flash protocol

- Fix port detection to use USB interface number (2/4/6) instead of
  COM number sorting. COM3=x.6 (user), COM4=x.2 (cmd/log), COM5=x.4
- Fix CP partition: use STYPE_AP_FLASH for EC7xx (not CP_FLASH)
- Fix CP address: subtract 0x800000 offset for EC7xx
- Fix log baud rate: use 921600 for EC718 USB CDC (2000000 rejected)

commit.message:
feat(llm): add context window budget and session cost management (#106)

* feat(llm): add context window budget and session cost management

Implements S07 context window management (AC-07.3) and cost management
(AC-07.5):

Context Window Budget (context_budget.py):
- Priority-based chunk system (P0=system/safety, P1=recent turns,
  P2=world state, P3=extended history)
- Truncates P3→P2 when over budget, never P0/P1
- Conservative token counting (~4 chars/token with 10% safety margin)

Session Cost Management (cost.py, llm_guard.py):
- Per-session cost accumulation with DB persistence
- 80% warning threshold, 100% hard cap (configurable)
- Budget enforcement in guarded_llm_call (pre-call check)
- Post-call cost recording via LLMCostTracker
- BudgetExceededError raised when cap hit

Infrastructure:
- Alembic migration 008: adds total_cost_usd, cost_warning_sent to
  game_sessions
- Prometheus counters: llm_cost_total, session_cost_exceeded,
  context_chunks_dropped
- Config: session_cost_warn_pct, turn_cost_cap_usd

Tests: 19 new tests + 2 existing tests updated (29 total passing)

Closes #104, Closes #105

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Fix tiered truncation algorithm (P3→P2 iterative removal)
- Wire all Prometheus counters (cost, context drops, session exceeded)

- Enforce turn_cost_cap_usd in llm_guard
